name: Bump.sh API Documentation API
what_it_does: Developer documentation platform with REST API — generating beautiful API references from OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specs with automatic change detection, diff-based changelogs, and CI/CD integration for keeping docs in sync with API evolution.
use_cases: Publishing API documentation from OpenAPI/AsyncAPI specs via CI/CD pipeline
Detecting breaking changes between API spec versions via diff API
Generating API changelog entries automatically from spec diffs
Querying API hub for internal API discovery across multiple API definitions
Embedding Bump.sh documentation as part of API governance workflow
not_for: Interactive API testing environments (use Postman or Insomnia)
Complex developer portal with identity and billing (use ReadMe or Apigee)
Documentation requiring custom code execution or tutorials
best_when: An API team wants spec-first documentation with automatic change detection, diff changelogs, and strong CI/CD integration for OpenAPI and AsyncAPI.
avoid_when: You need interactive API testing, complex developer onboarding flows, or API usage analytics.

auth.notes: API token from account settings. Authorization header with Token prefix. Documentation-scoped tokens. No OAuth2 or scopes. Webhook for spec deployment and diff events.

pricing.notes: Free tier for basic public docs. Per-API hub pricing. French company (Paris) — EU-first. Bootstrapped and profitable. Strong CI/CD integration focus. GitHub Actions support. AsyncAPI support differentiates from ReadMe. Growing developer tool community.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; reasonable for CI/CD usage

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for documentation deployments, diffs, and hubs. Token auth. Webhook for deployment events. Good CI/CD-focused documentation. Diff API for change detection is unique. Both OpenAPI and AsyncAPI support. Token prefix pattern (not 'Bearer').
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Spec deployment with same content is idempotent. Diff operations always idempotent. Documentation version management idempotent by version identifier.
known_agent_gotchas: Diff API returns breaking vs non-breaking changes — parse carefully
AsyncAPI specs require different content-type than OpenAPI
Hub subdomain in API URLs — documentation-scoped access

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. French company — EU data residency and strong privacy culture. Token auth. No scope granularity. Standard security for documentation platform. Bootstrapped company — lean security team but strong EU compliance.
